description.content: On-demand vessel position, voyage, and master data lookups.
Return AIS and optionally Voyage / Master data for one or more vessels identified by IMO or MMSI.

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.
Comma-separated list of IMO numbers. Either imo or mmsi is required.
Comma-separated list of MMSI numbers. Either imo or mmsi is required.
Response format. Defaults to JSON.
Additional datasets to include in the response. Supported values are `voyage` and `master`.
Maximum age of returned positions in minutes.
Set to 1 to include satellite positions.

response.name: Array of vessels with AIS data and optional Voyage / Master sections.

description.content: Arrival and departure events for vessels or ports.
Return arrival and departure events for one or more vessels (by IMO or MMSI) or for a port (by LOCODE).

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.
(Required) Maximum age of returned events in minutes.
Comma-separated list of IMO numbers. One of imo, mmsi, or locode is required.
Comma-separated list of MMSI numbers. One of imo, mmsi, or locode is required.
UN/LOCODE port identifier. Cannot be combined with imo or mmsi.
Response format. Defaults to JSON.
Filter to a single event type.
Start of the date window (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS, UTC).
End of the date window (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS, UTC).
Additional datasets to include. Supported values are `ais` and `voyage`.
Maximum number of events to return.
Return only events with id greater than this value.
0 to exclude anchorage events, 1 to include, 2 to return anchorage events only.
Restrict events to vessels carrying an IMO number.

description.content: Vessels with announced ETAs at a selected port.
Return vessels with announced ETAs at the selected port within an interval or date window.

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.
(Required) UN/LOCODE port identifier.
Look-ahead window in minutes from now. Use either interval or fromdate/todate.
Response format. Defaults to JSON.
Filter by AIS ship type code(s), comma separated.

description.content: Static vessel particulars by IMO.
Return static vessel particulars (Master dataset) by IMO.

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.
(Required) Comma-separated list of IMO numbers.
Response format. Defaults to JSON.

description.content: Sea-route distance and geometry between two points.
Return the shortest sea route between two coordinates as a GeoJSON LineString together with distance in meters.

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.
(Required) Origin as `lon,lat`.
(Required) Destination as `lon,lat`.
Comma-separated list of allowed gateways (suez, panama, kiel, oresund, messina, corinth, malacca, drake, magellan, northeast, northwest).
Emission Control Area preference.
Set to 1 to return coordinates in WebMercator (EPSG:3857).

response.name: GeoJSON Feature describing the computed route.

description.content: Predefined-fleet data, subscription-based.
Return AIS, Voyage, and/or Master data for the account's predefined fleet (subscription).

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.
Response format. Defaults to JSON.
Maximum position age in minutes.

response.name: Array of vessels in the account's predefined fleet.

description.content: All vessels within a predefined geographic area, subscription-based.
Return all vessels in the account's predefined rectangular area (subscription).

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.
Response format. Defaults to JSON.
Maximum position age in minutes.

response.name: Array of vessels currently in the predefined area.

description.content: Account status and remaining credits.
Return the remaining API credits and access expiration date for the account.

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.
Response format. Defaults to JSON.

description.content: Manage the watchlist of vessels backing the VesselsList method.
Return the current list of vessels (IMO and MMSI) backing the VesselsList method.

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

response.name: Array of vessel identifiers in the watchlist.

description.content: Add the supplied vessels (by IMO or MMSI) to the watchlist.

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

description.content: Comma-separated IMO numbers.
Comma-separated MMSI numbers.
Comma-separated IMO numbers.
Comma-separated MMSI numbers.
Replace all vessels in the watchlist with the supplied list.

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

description.content: Comma-separated IMO numbers.
Comma-separated MMSI numbers.
Comma-separated IMO numbers.
Comma-separated MMSI numbers.
Remove the supplied vessels from the watchlist.

query.description: (Required) Personal API key issued by VesselFinder.

description.content:
REST API providing real-time and on-demand AIS vessel positions, voyage information,
and vessel master data from the VesselFinder global AIS network (terrestrial and satellite).
Authentication is performed via the `userkey` query parameter. Responses default to JSON
and may be requested as XML by setting `format=xml`. Most pay-per-use methods deduct credits
from the account's balance; subscription methods (VesselsList, LiveData) are billed by fleet
or area size and dataset selection.


Contact Support:
 Name: VesselFinder API Support
